SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEUFERT, TIMOTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRATE & BARREL OF CALIFORNIA, INC. $4,163.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,228.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY SEUFERT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRATE & BARREL OF CALIFORNIA INC.IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRENT SMITH GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN.
